name: Enchilada Torte
recipeIngredient: ¼ cup Green bell pepper; chopped
4 oz Can chopped green chilies; drained
¾ cup Pitted black olives (3 oz); sliced
1 ½ cups Sharp cheddar cheese; shredded
1 ½ cups Monterey Jack cheese; shredded, mix both cheeses together
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the turkey into a 1 ½- to 2-quart microwave-safe measure or bowl.
2. Add onion, green pepper, and garlic. Cover with waxed paper; microwave on high for 4 to 6 minutes, stirring twice to break up meat until it loses its pink color.
3. Stir in the remaining sauce ingredients. Cover with waxed paper and microwave on high for 4 to 6 minutes, stirring once or twice, until the sauce is slightly thickened and hot.
4. Assemble by putting a tortilla in the bottom of a deep 1 ½-quart microwave-safe casserole.
5. Top with 1 cup sauce, then ¾ cup cheese mixture. Repeat layers 3 times, ending with a layer of cheese.
6. Cover with waxed paper and microwave on high for 3 to 5 minutes until hot and cheese is melted. Let stand covered for 3 minutes.
7. Cut into wedges and serve with sour cream, lettuce, and olives.
Makes 6 servings.
